title: The Control Kill List
subtitle: We mutation-tested our own controls. For every control we injected the exact defect it exists to catch. A control that does not fire on its own named defect is theatre.

headline.note: Cumulative across five passes. Pass 1 covered the highest-tier customer-impacting set (13). Pass 2 extended to the inventoried-but-untested tail: the compliance trackers, the health / page-consistency gates, the daemon change-detection gate, plus a structural read-only check of the LLM-judge evaluators (their judgement quality is documented as not deterministically mutation-testable, not counted here). Pass 2 found 5 new killer-pattern GAPS (KL-4..KL-8); F8 (2026-07-13) CLOSED all five. Pass 4 (2026-07-14) fixed + registered two director-named theatre controls (deadman liveness FAIL-OPEN; the completion-claim TAUTOLOGY). Pass 5 (2026-07-16, F6 HARDEN) registered the three load-bearing Tier-1 STRUCTURAL bill controls that were F6 evidence but absent from this apparatus (arithmetic footing, non-negativity/fail-CLOSED, temporal sanity -- all three FIRE), and red-teaming them fixed a real FAIL-OPEN: the temporal-sanity control checked start<=end only, so an ordered multi-decade period passed -- now a >731-day single-period span also fails CLOSED. The 1 THEATRE control remains the flagship vat_by_segment arithmetic check -- a tautology, mitigated by an independent cross-check that fires. 10 controls fixed cumulatively; 0 registered gaps remain.

examples: social_obligation non_compliant status-trust (KL-6 FIXED F8) -- now folds independent underspend evidence
pre-bill gate skipped VAT validation on subtotal <= 0 (FIXED)
green_claims zero-obligation -> COMPLIANT (KL-7 FIXED F8: NOT_APPLICABLE / fail-closed)
dashboard _check_consistency per-key skip (KL-8 FIXED F8: one-sided key = mismatch)
Qwen internal-audit backstop returned clean when Ollama was down (FIXED)
population estimated-read empty-log -> clean (KL-4 FIXED F8: empty log flags)
consumer_duty empty-register -> GREEN (KL-5 FIXED F8: distinct NOT_ASSESSED state)
dashboard _check_consistency no-insights -> pass (KL-8 FIXED F8: fails closed)

controls.name: Run change-detection (dedup) gate

controls.name: LLM-judge evaluators (structural)
controls.defect: a judge able to Write/Edit its way to a PASS
controls.note: read-only guarantee asserted; verdict quality not deterministically mutation-testable

fixed_this_pass.before: returned clean when Ollama was down; audit passed by not running
fixed_this_pass.after: third 'unavailable' verdict alarms; sanity daemon reports the outage
negative subtotal and VAT-on-nothing fail closed (HELD)

fixed_gaps_f8.before: empty meter_read_log read clean though total absence of reads is the most-broken state
fixed_gaps_f8.after: empty log now returns a finding (fires); outcome-safe -- live run's 1,588 reads still read clean
returns distinct NOT_ASSESSED state (not green); is_assessed()/needs_attention() flags added; populated all-green still GREEN

fixed_gaps_f8.before: compliance from the self-declared status field alone; a mislabelled-PAID underspend passed
fixed_gaps_f8.after: folds in independent is_underspend evidence, so the mislabel fires; genuine PAID full-spend still not flagged; PROJECTED excluded
no-claims -> NOT_APPLICABLE (distinct from COMPLIANT); green product in use with broken zero obligation -> NON_COMPLIANT (fails closed)

fixed_gaps_f8.before: missing run_insights.json returned pass; a one-sided missing headline key was silently skipped
fixed_gaps_f8.after: absent/empty insights fails closed (raises the consistency alarm; pipeline guarantees the file); one-sided missing key is a mismatch; both-absent still skipped; real dashboard carries all 8 keys both sides

coverage_honesty: Pass 2 reaches near-full apparatus coverage of the DETERMINISTIC controls: compliance trackers, health/page-consistency gates, and the daemon change-detection gate are now mutation-tested. F8 (2026-07-13) then CLOSED all five registered gaps (KL-4..KL-8), each with a passing mutation test proving the control fires and each verified outcome-safe against the live population -- 0 registered gaps remain. Still honestly UNCOVERED: the LLM-judge evaluators' verdict QUALITY (only their read-only structure is asserted -- no fixed prompt->NEEDS_WORK oracle exists), the daemon SCHEDULING loops (cadence/cooldown/restart backoff), and the long tail of accumulator-style regulatory registers. See control_registry.json for the full list.
